posts.raw_content:
As the headline suggests, there are a brigade of retarded IDF faggots that are here to defend Israel from the slings and arrows of simply receiving criticism.

You IDF cunts are unbelievable the way you think people don't notice you. But then, you really hate The Noticing™, don't you?

Let's show the IDF the disrespect they've earned and downvote anything they post, no matter what it is (well, when downvoting becomes available again, I suppose):

u/Agent_86 - Watch this faggot play his fake and gay "religious" character around the site. "I'll amen that, lol" he'll post like it's not fucking retarded. He also deletes his post history to hide his Israeli cocksucking devotion and his temper tantrums when he breaks character.  
u/RoryMiller77 - A likely alt for Agent_86.  
u/Tiger5468 - An alt of chainsucking-jew-dic -- er, I mean blockchain-the-vote.  
u/blockchain-the-vote - This cunt cares A LOT about his updoot score, so downvote him everywhere, no matter what he posts. He likes to be OP to get those sweet, sweet updoots he craves, so make sure to downvote those as well.  
u/Porkbut - This dude is just a fucking putz who posts some of the stupidest shit I've ever seen. He likes to keep badgering you into getting back on whatever script he's using because he's lost without it. I'm really not sure why he bothers other than his undying love for jew jizz.  
u/TheBeerJoo - This guy is just a belligerent faggot internet "tough guy" and I'm almost certain he's an alt for one of the twats above. He's been getting brutalized even without downvotes and a lot of his comments are getting "community filter"-ed which is excellent.  
u/FatigueIsReal - Admitted alt of RINO_fatigue and just as much of a faggot shill. Congrats on exposing yourself and making onto the list, retard.  
u/RINO_fatigue - FatigueIsReal's favorite alt.  
u/PiratePatriot - I caught this guy lecturing someone else about criticizing "jews" and he tells the person: "There are plenty of reasons to dislike Jews, your logic falls outside the justified reasons." I've been attempting to get him to elaborate the "justified reasons to dislike jews", but he just downvotes and runs off.  
u/MIGA-Mike (BANNED) - This retarded handshake shill posted this: "maybe it happens every cycle because we usually don't protect Israel enough." And then tried to tell me I responded to the wrong person when I called him a shill and told him to fuck off. Super fuckin' retarded, this one.

**Dishonorable Mentions**  
u/_Liberty_Prime_ - Without a doubt, the faggot I've gotten the most tips on. While I have not yet personally seen him defend Israel to an absurd degree, like I have with everyone on the list above, I am told he's a member of the IDF. I've been keeping my eye on him.  
u/TrancePhreak - Not an IDF member that I have seen, but this is the annoying jackass that likes to tag -f-b-i- and tattle on other users "not following the rules" as he sees it. How he hasn't caught a spam ban is anyone's guess. I wouldn't be surprised to find out this is an IDF alt.  
u/Ficklepimper - Again, I have not seen this person shill for Isreal, but this is that dipshit that posts facebook-tier memes, uses alts to upvote them and then says his garbage is "what the site wants" when called on his bullshit. Again, I wouldn't be surprised to find out this is an IDF alt.

I am certain there are more...

These ass-clowns post like they're just regular ol' dudes like you and me, goyim. Lying in wait for anyone who posts a criticism of Israel as minor as a swastika scrawled into a bathroom stall and then they swoop in to make sure that that person knows they are an "antisemite" that wants all jews dead.

It's beyond fucking tiresome at this point.

They've appointed themselves the Rabbi Nosferatu of PDW's very own fake and gay ADL and they're all transparent shills in this regard.

But then they've got to do *something*. Through their manipulation and conniving they've managed to decouple a lot of people from their past and heritage. Which sounds great when you're trying to divide people so you can fuck them over, but the unintended consequence is that they've created legions of people who don't give a shit about anything that happened before they were born.

WWII? Hitler? The Holocaust™? Ancient history and no one fucking cares, so it can't be used to guilt people into sympathizing with these parasites. So, they employ a brigade of faggots to make sure everyone is reminded that any criticism of "jews" or Our Greatestestestestestestestestestestest Ally™ is the worst thing you could ever do in life, goyim.

These faggot shills are really stuck on their usernames, too. Even after fully being exposed, they still cling to these compromised accounts. I don't know for a fact, but I think it may have to do with compensation. I'm fairly certain that they can't just create a brand new account, post "Isreal Rocks!" and expect to receive their $7,000. I think they need to be able to show that they have some level of influence with the goyim and they'll receive *up to* $7,000 depending on how influential and persuasive they are. 

So, blatant shills, why not get to fucking all the way off like you've all been told?

Don't reply, don't log into an alt, don't delete your post history, do not pass GO, do not collect $7,000.

Just get the fuck out you retarded faggots.

And just in case you've forgotten:

In the course of your fucking off, you may come to a gate with a sign that reads:

"NO FUCKING OFF  
BEYOND THIS POINT"

But I want you to seize the day, ignore that sign, open that gate and keep right on fucking off.
